name: IdsEdwProvAcrdtnDExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XYZ_TMP_IdsEdwProvAcrdtnDExtr;WITH T1 AS (SELECT PROV_ACRDTN_SK,SRC_SYS_CD_SK,PROV_ID,PROV_ACRDTN_SEQ_NO,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,PROV_SK,PROV_ACRDTN_CRTF_DT_SK,PROV_ACRDTN_EXPRTN_DT_SK,PROV_ACRDTN_RECRTF_DT_SK,PROV_ACRDTN_DESC,PROV_ACRDTN_STTUS_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_ACRDTN WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}),T2 AS (SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK,COALESCE(TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD,COALESCE(TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG),T3 AS (SELECT T1.PROV_ACRDTN_SK,T2.TRGT_CD AS raw_SRC_SYS_CD,T1.PROV_ID,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_SEQ_NO,T1.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T1.PROV_SK,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_CRTF_DT_SK,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_EXPRTN_DT_SK,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_RECRTF_DT_SK,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_DESC,T1.PROV_ACRDTN_STTUS_DESC FROM T1 LEFT JOIN T2 ON T1.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=T2.CD_MPPNG_SK),T4 AS (SELECT T3.PROV_ACRDTN_SK,CASE WHEN T3.raw_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR LEN(T3.raw_SRC_SYS_CD)=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE T3.raw_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD,T3.PROV_ID,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_SEQ_NO,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,T3.PROV_SK,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_CRTF_DT_SK,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_DESC,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_EXPRTN_DT_SK,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_RECRTF_DT_SK,T3.PROV_ACRDTN_STTUS_DESC,T3.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM T3) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XYZ_TMP_IdsEdwProvAcrdtnDExtr FROM T4

Description:

CALLED BY:   EdwProvExtrSeq

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job extracts data from the IDS PROV_ACRDTN table and loads the EDW table

Annotations:
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
CD_MPPNG_SK
ProvIpaRelshpTermRsnCdSk
Write PROV_ACRDTN Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvAcrdtnDLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS PROV_ACRDTN Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: IdsEdwProvAcrdtnDExtr
